title: goniophlebium meniscifolium var. adnatum
intro: Goniophlebium meniscifolium var. adnatum, also known as a type of fern, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goniophlebium meniscifolium var. adnatum are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a topical application, though more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
